segments.text: Lord, remember David And all his afflictions
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: How he swore to the Lord,
And vowed to the Mighty One of Jacob
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Surely I will not go into the chamber of my house, Or go up to the comfort of my bed
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I will not give sleep to my eyes Or slumber to my eyelids
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Until I find a place for the Lord, A dwelling place for the Mighty One of Jacob
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Behold, we heard of it in Ephrathah; We found it in the fields of the woods
Let us go into His tabernacle; Let us worship at His footstool
segments.speaker: Worshippers

segments.text: Arise, O Lord, to Your resting place, You and the ark of Your strength
segments.speaker: Worshippers

segments.text: Let Your priests be clothed with righteousness, And let Your saints shout for joy
segments.speaker: Worshippers

segments.text: For Your servant David's sake, Do not turn away the face of Your Anointed
segments.speaker: Worshippers

segments.text: The Lord has sworn in truth to David;
He will not turn from it: I will set upon your throne the fruit of your body
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: If your sons will keep My covenant And My testimony which I shall teach them, Their sons also shall sit upon your throne forevermore
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: For the Lord has chosen Zion; He has desired it for His dwelling place
This is My resting place forever; Here I will dwell, for I have desired it
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: I will abundantly bless her provision; I will satisfy her poor with bread
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: I will also clothe her priests with salvation, And her saints shall shout aloud for joy
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: There I will make the horn of David grow; I will prepare a lamp for My Anointed
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: His enemies I will clothe with shame, But upon Himself His crown shall flourish
segments.speaker: The Lord
